channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Global geopolitical news curated from Tier 1 and Tier 2 sources

item.title: 🇷🇺🇨🇳 Putin to Visit China Days After Trump as Russia Seeks to Deepen Strategic Partnership
item.description: Russian President Vladimir Putin will travel to Beijing to meet Xi Jinping following Trump summit, aiming to reinforce Sino-Russian cooperation amid evolving global dynamics.

item.title: 🇫🇷🇺🇦 France Ready to Develop Ballistic Missile Defense With Ukraine, Zelensky Says
item.description: French President discussed strengthening capabilities to repel Russian attacks, with Zelensky calling the cooperation an important step in air defense development.

item.title: 🇷🇺 Russians Worry More About Strikes at Home Than Front Line for First Time Since 2022
item.description: A new poll shows shifting public anxiety inside Russia, with growing concern about domestic attacks versus battlefield risks as Ukrainian drone strikes intensify.

item.title: 🇮🇱⚔️ Gaza: Israel Kills Hamas Military Chief Izz al-Din al-Haddad in Strike
item.description: Hamas official confirms military chief killed in Israeli attack; joint funeral held for Haddad, his wife and daughter as regional tensions remain elevated.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇮🇱🇮🇷 US-Israel Preparing for Possible Renewal of Strikes on Iran, Report Says
item.description: Haaretz reports preparations underway for potential new strikes against Iranian targets as diplomatic negotiations remain stalled.

item.title: 🇷🇺 Russia Captures Two Villages in Ukraine's Kharkiv Region
item.description: Russian forces have taken control of Borova and Kutkivka settlements in Kharkiv, marking continued territorial gains as Moscow presses its offensive in eastern Ukraine.

item.title: ⚠️ Zelenskiy Warns Russia May Attack NATO from Belarus
item.description: Ukraine's president says Moscow is seeking to draw Belarus deeper into the war and weighing plans to attack Ukraine's north or a NATO country from Belarusian territory.

item.title: 🇨🇦 Canada Deepens Arctic Defense Ties With Nordic Nations
item.description: Prime Minister Carney strengthens alliances with "middle powers" as the US becomes a less reliable partner, focusing on Arctic security amid growing geopolitical tensions.

item.title: ⚖️ Consumers Sue Amazon Over Unlawful Trump Tariff Costs
item.description: Amazon faces lawsuit from consumers seeking refunds for higher prices resulting from tariffs the Supreme Court later ruled were unlawfully imposed by President Trump.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇨🇳 US CEOs Pursue Diplomacy in Beijing Following Trump Summit
item.description: American business leaders from Citigroup and Goldman Sachs meet Chinese officials, hoping political goodwill will translate into regulatory approvals and lucrative deals.

item.title: 🇰🇲 Comoros fuel protests turn deadly amid Iran war price spikes
item.description: One person killed and five injured in clashes on the Comorian island of Anjouan as unrest over fuel price hikes spreads across the archipelago, linked to global supply disruptions from the Strait of Hormuz crisis.

item.title: 🇱🇻 Latvia faces political uncertainty as president names opposition lawmaker as PM candidate
item.description: Latvian President Edgars Rinkevics proposed opposition lawmaker Andris Kulbergs as the next prime minister after Evika Silina resigned, amid regional security concerns.

item.title: ⛽ US and Brazil ethanol exports surge as countries seek fuel alternatives
item.description: The world's two largest ethanol producers are seeing export increases as consuming countries seek alternative fuel sources while the Strait of Hormuz crisis continues.

item.title: 🇨🇳 China criticizes US Hormuz resolution at UN as timing and content questioned
item.description: China's UN ambassador criticized a proposed US-Bahraini resolution on the Strait of Hormuz, saying the content and timing were inappropriate and passing it would not be helpful.

item.title: 🇮🇹🇪🇺 Italy's Meloni wins European backing for third-country migrant return hubs
item.description: Italian PM Giorgia Meloni hailed a shift in European migration policy as her controversial approach to offshore migrant processing gains support across the Council of Europe.

item.title: 🇫🇷🇺🇦 France to develop ballistic missile defense system with Ukraine
item.description: President Zelensky announced France's readiness to cooperate on ballistic missile defense, calling it an important step in strengthening Ukraine's ability to repel Russian attacks.

item.title: 🇷🇺⚔️ Poll: Russians fear strikes at home more than front line for first time since 2022
item.description: Ukrainian drone strikes deep inside Russia have shifted Russian public concern from battlefield developments to domestic security, according to a new poll.

item.title: 🇦🇪 UAE States All Actions Were Defensive Measures to Protect Sovereignty
item.description: The United Arab Emirates foreign ministry issued a statement saying all actions taken by the Gulf country were defensive measures aimed at protecting its sovereignty, civilians, and vital infrastructure amid regional tensions.

item.title: ⚽🇮🇷 FIFA Officials to Meet Iranian FA Over World Cup Participation
item.description: FIFA Secretary-General Mattias Grafstrom will meet Iranian Football Federation officials in Istanbul to offer reassurance over Iran participation in the upcoming World Cup amid the ongoing Iran-US conflict.

item.title: 🎤🏳️ Eurovision Song Contest Final Proceeds Amid Gaza Boycott
item.description: Five countries have withdrawn from the Eurovision Song Contest final over Israel participation, with the event taking place against the backdrop of ongoing Middle East tensions.

item.title: 🇨🇺🇺🇸 US Reportedly Preparing to Indict Former Cuban Leader Raul Castro
item.description: The US Justice Department is reportedly preparing to criminally indict former Cuban leader Raul Castro in the coming days, marking a significant development in US-Cuba relations.

item.title: 🦠 Congo Confirms New Ebola Outbreak with 80 Deaths
item.description: Africa CDC confirms Ebola outbreak in Democratic Republic of Congo's Ituri province. Health officials are mobilizing response efforts to contain the spread.

item.title: 💧 US Proposes Dramatic Colorado River Water Cuts Amid Drought
item.description: US government plans could cut up to 40% of water supplies to Arizona, California and Nevada. The drought-stricken Colorado River basin faces unprecedented pressure from climate change and overuse.

item.title: 🇺🇸 Trump-Targeted Senator Cassidy Faces Louisiana Primary Test
item.description: Republican Senator Bill Cassidy, targeted by Trump for retribution over impeachment vote, faces competitive primary in Louisiana. Results will test Trump's influence on GOP congressional races.

item.title: 🤖 OpenAI Signs Deal to Provide ChatGPT Plus to All Maltese Citizens
item.description: OpenAI partners with Malta's government to give all residents access to ChatGPT Plus for one year following AI training course. First nationwide AI access program of its kind.
